review_flagged.review: evolution to soul_master at level 150 is a curated 1.0-era backport (075/095d datasets ship no second classes); rest of the record is the shipped shared-initializer data

1.0-era backport: second class of the dark_wizard line (class change at level 150 predates season 3); defined only in the s6 dataset; rebuilt with classic-pvp rules, shield/master/pet formulas dropped
evolution to blade_knight at level 150 is a curated 1.0-era backport (075/095d datasets ship no second classes); rest of the record is the shipped shared-initializer data

1.0-era backport: second class of the dark_knight line (class change at level 150 predates season 3); defined only in the s6 dataset; rebuilt with classic-pvp rules, shield/master/pet formulas dropped
evolution to muse_elf at level 150 is a curated 1.0-era backport (075/095d datasets ship no second classes); rest of the record is the shipped shared-initializer data
1.0-era backport: second class of the fairy_elf line (class change at level 150 predates season 3); defined only in the s6 dataset; rebuilt with classic-pvp rules, shield/master/pet formulas dropped
fruit_calculation curated to magic_gladiator per the domain fruit caps (default 127 / mg 100 / dl 115); the shipped initializer never assigns a strategy (all default) and fruits are 1.0-era content

1.0-era backport: dark lord shipped around v1.0 but is absent from the 075/095d datasets; rebuilt with classic-pvp rules; raven/horse/pet and master-tree formulas dropped (see gaps); fruit_calculation dark_lord per domain caps

gaps: bonus_damage_with_scepter_cmd_div: master skill tree bucket (S4+) excluded - dropped dark_lord:stat_formula (targets bonus_damage_with_scepter)
bonus_defense_rate_with_shield: master skill tree bucket (S4+) excluded - dropped global:stat_formula (targets defense_rate_pvm)
bonus_defense_with_horse: dark horse trainable pet excluded per spec - dropped dark_lord:stat_formula (targets defense_final)
bonus_defense_with_shield: master skill tree bucket (S4+) excluded - dropped global:stat_formula (targets defense_final)
damage_receive_horse_decrement: dark horse trainable pet excluded per spec - dropped dark_lord:stat_formula (targets damage_receive_decrement)

fenrir_base_dmg: fenrir trainable pet (S2) excluded per spec - dropped blade_knight:stat_formula (targets fenrir_base_dmg); dark_knight:stat_formula (targets fenrir_base_dmg); dark_lord:stat_formula (targets fenrir_base_dmg); dark_wizard:stat_formula (targets fenrir_base_dmg); fairy_elf:stat_formula (targets fenrir_base_dmg); magic_gladiator:stat_formula (targets fenrir_base_dmg); muse_elf:stat_formula (targets fenrir_base_dmg); soul_master:stat_formula (targets fenrir_base_dmg)
innovation_def_decrement: innovation skill (S3+) excluded - dropped global:stat_formula (targets temp_innovation_defense_decrement)
is_horse_equipped: dark horse trainable pet excluded per spec - dropped dark_lord:stat_formula (targets defense_final)
master_level: master system (S4+) excluded; pre-S3 total_level == level - dropped global:stat_formula (targets total_level)
master_skill_phys_bonus_dmg: master skill tree bucket (S4+) excluded - dropped dark_lord:stat_formula (targets master_skill_phys_bonus_dmg)

one_handed_staff_bonus_base_damage: master skill tree bucket (S4+) excluded - dropped dark_wizard:stat_formula (targets wizardry_base_dmg); magic_gladiator:stat_formula (targets wizardry_base_dmg); soul_master:stat_formula (targets wizardry_base_dmg)
pet_duration_increase: MISSING from stat_map.json (possibly pre-S3 relevant) - stats agent should add or confirm exclusion - dropped dark_lord:const_value (value 1.0)
raven_attack_damage_increase: dark raven trainable pet excluded per spec - dropped dark_lord:stat_formula (targets raven_attack_damage_increase)
raven_attack_rate: dark raven trainable pet excluded per spec - dropped dark_lord:const_value (value 1000.0); dark_lord:stat_formula (targets raven_attack_rate)
raven_attack_speed: dark raven trainable pet excluded per spec - dropped dark_lord:const_value (value 20.0); dark_lord:stat_formula (targets raven_attack_speed)
raven_bonus_damage: dark raven trainable pet excluded per spec - dropped dark_lord:stat_formula (targets raven_bonus_damage)
raven_critical_damage_chance: dark raven trainable pet excluded per spec - dropped dark_lord:const_value (value 0.3)

raven_level: dark raven trainable pet excluded per spec - dropped dark_lord:stat_formula (targets raven_attack_rate); dark_lord:stat_formula (targets raven_attack_speed); dark_lord:stat_formula (targets raven_maximum_damage); dark_lord:stat_formula (targets raven_minimum_damage)
raven_maximum_damage: dark raven trainable pet excluded per spec - dropped dark_lord:const_value (value 200.0); dark_lord:stat_formula (targets raven_maximum_damage)
raven_minimum_damage: dark raven trainable pet excluded per spec - dropped dark_lord:const_value (value 180.0); dark_lord:stat_formula (targets raven_minimum_damage)

resets: reset system is a custom server feature, not classic pre-S3 - dropped blade_knight:base_stat (value 0); dark_knight:base_stat (value 0); dark_lord:base_stat (value 0); dark_wizard:base_stat (value 0); fairy_elf:base_stat (value 0); magic_gladiator:base_stat (value 0); muse_elf:base_stat (value 0); soul_master:base_stat (value 0)
scepter_pet_bonus_damage: master skill tree bucket (S4+) excluded - dropped dark_lord:stat_formula (targets raven_bonus_damage)
shield_item_defense_increase: water-socket (S3+) shield defense multiplier excluded per facts - dropped global:stat_formula (targets defense_final)
temp_innovation_defense_decrement: innovation skill (S3+) excluded - dropped global:stat_formula (targets defense_decrement); global:stat_formula (targets temp_innovation_defense_decrement)

two_handed_staff_bonus_base_damage: master skill tree bucket (S4+) excluded - dropped dark_wizard:stat_formula (targets wizardry_base_dmg); magic_gladiator:stat_formula (targets wizardry_base_dmg); soul_master:stat_formula (targets wizardry_base_dmg)

weapon_mastery_attack_speed: master skill tree bucket (S4+) excluded - dropped blade_knight:stat_formula (targets attack_speed_any); dark_knight:stat_formula (targets attack_speed_any); dark_wizard:stat_formula (targets attack_speed_any); fairy_elf:stat_formula (targets attack_speed_any); magic_gladiator:stat_formula (targets attack_speed_any); muse_elf:stat_formula (targets attack_speed_any); soul_master:stat_formula (targets attack_speed_any)
notes: combo_bonus formulas (dark_knight line) ship in the shared initializer that 075/095d run, so they are kept under 075 even though the skill combo historically arrived ~1.0
nova_stage_damage const 0.0 (dark_wizard line) ships in the shared initializer; the nova skill itself is a 1.0-era backport handled by the skills extractor
can_fly gained from the dinorant-equipped flag ships in the shared initializer (dinorant is ~0.97 content); kept under 075
total_level == level pre-S3: the master-level contribution to total_level was dropped with the master system
second-class backports reuse the shared creators under classic-pvp rules; the s6 dataset ships them with shield/pvp-rate blocks which are excluded pre-S3
the client creation-unlock bitmask (mg=4, dl=2) is a client protocol concern and is not modeled; creation_unlock_level carries the domain rule
